title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at AFL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at AFL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AFL Logistics. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!
